text: TEL AVIV HIT: Iranian ballistic missile strikes residential area in central Tel Aviv — 100kg warhead detonates, apartment facade mangled, 4 lightly injured; NPR confirms crater on scene

sources.name: Times of Israel — 4 people lightly hurt as Iranian missile hits Tel Aviv
NPR — Iran fires more missiles at Israel

text: TEHRAN OVERNIGHT: IDF strikes IRGC security HQ, Intelligence Ministry HQ, Khatam-al Anbiya command center in major overnight strike package; IDF says 330 of Iran's 470 missile launchers now destroyed

sources.name: Times of Israel — IDF hits intel and military HQs in overnight Tehran strikes
Jerusalem Post — IDF strikes targets in Tehran including intelligence HQ

text: LEBANON EXPELS IRAN: Lebanon declares Iran's incoming ambassador persona non grata, orders him to leave by March 29 — cites IRGC direct command of Hezbollah as violation of diplomatic norms; Lebanon also recalled its own ambassador to Tehran

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Lebanon declares Iranian ambassador persona non grata
The National — Lebanon declares incoming Iranian ambassador persona non grata

text: IRAN SECURITY CHIEF: Iran appoints hardline IRGC veteran Mohammad-Bagher Zolghadr to replace assassinated security chief Larijani — appointment seen as signal of continued military posture

sources.name: Bloomberg — Iran Appoints IRGC Veteran Zolghadr as Security Chief

text: DEAL SIGNALS: Iran International reports Araghchi privately told Witkoff/Kushner Iran has Khamenei approval to 'close the issue quickly' — but Iran's parliament speaker publicly denies all talks; Islamabad meeting being arranged

sources.name: Iran International — Iran foreign minister signaled readiness for deal
Al Jazeera — Where do US-Iran negotiations leave Israel?

text: GULF STATES DAY 25: Iran fires ~20 drones at Saudi Eastern Province, activates Kuwait air defenses 7+ times overnight, UAE intercepts ballistic missile targeting Abu Dhabi — 1 Indian national injured; Bahrain cumulative count: 153 missiles + 301 drones intercepted

sources.name: Al Jazeera Day 25 liveblog
NBC News Iran war live updates March 24

text: CENTCOM: US has now struck 2,000+ Iranian targets, conducted 9,000 combat sorties, destroyed 19 Iranian ships + 1 submarine — Adm. Cooper announces weeks-long Hormuz reopening operation; IDF confirms 330 of Iran's 470 missile launchers now destroyed

sources.name: C-SPAN — CENTCOM Update on Operation Epic Fury

text: ISFAHAN STRIKES: IDF bombs Iran’s main explosives production facility in Isfahan — 120+ bombs dropped across dozens of targets including ballistic missile launch sites and weapons factories; factory had been restored since June 2025 strike

sources.name: Times of Israel — Israeli Air Force bombed key Iranian explosives facility in Isfahan
Iran International — Israel strikes missile facility in Isfahan

text: NORTHERN ISRAEL: Hezbollah rocket kills Israeli woman at Mahanayim Junction; man sustains serious shrapnel head wounds — Hezbollah also fires ~30-rocket barrage at Haifa Bay; IDF responds with southern Lebanon airstrikes

sources.name: Times of Israel — Woman declared dead after Hezbollah rocket attack
Jerusalem Post — One killed, two wounded by Hezbollah rocket fire in northern Israel

text: DEADLIEST IRAQ STRIKE: US airstrike kills PMF commander Saad Dawai al-Baiji + 14 fighters at Habbaniyah base, Anbar — deadliest single strike on Iraqi militias since war began; 30 wounded, some critical; militia announces $100K bounty for US forces locations

sources.name: The National — Air strike kills 15 PMF fighters in Iraq in deadliest attack since start of Iran war
Kurdistan 24 — PMF Anbar Operations Commander and 14 Fighters Killed in US Strike

text: CLUSTER WARHEAD: Iran fires ballistic missile with cluster warhead at central Israel — bomblets scatter across Petah Tikva and Bnei Brak, 6 wounded by shrapnel; earlier Tel Aviv residential strike hit with 220lb conventional warhead, 4 lightly injured

sources.name: Jerusalem Post — At least six injured after shrapnel hits Tel Aviv area
Al Jazeera — What are Iran’s cluster munitions that are penetrating Israeli defenses?

text: TRUMP: “WAR HAS BEEN WON” — announces 5-day pause on Iranian power plant strikes; claims Iran offered “very significant prize” on Hormuz; Pakistan mediating talks with Rubio, Vance, Witkoff, Kushner — Iran publicly denies direct negotiations

sources.name: NPR — Trump declares victory and claims Iran offers a prize in talks Iran has denied having
CNN — Live updates: Trump says Vance and Rubio participating in talks with Iran

text: IRAN IRGC HQ DESTROYED: IDF strikes main IRGC central security headquarters in Tehran + energy facilities in Isfahan, Khorramshahr, Tabriz, Bandar Abbas, Sirjan — 50+ targets in wave; Bushehr nuclear plant vicinity struck 350m from reactor (IAEA: no radiation)

sources.name: JNS — IDF launches large-scale strikes hitting main IRGC security headquarters
Times of Israel — Iran says US and Israel attacked vicinity of Bushehr nuclear plant

text: 82ND AIRBORNE DEPLOYING: Pentagon orders 2,000-3,000 82nd Airborne soldiers + 2 Marine Expeditionary Units (~5,000 troops) to Middle East; Israel expands reserves to 400,000; Iran fires missiles at Eilat and Jerusalem — all intercepted

sources.name: Bloomberg — US Set to Deploy 2,000 Troops From 82nd Airborne to Middle East
Military Times — US expected to send thousands of soldiers to Middle East

text: LEBANON BREAKS WITH IRAN: FM declares Iranian ambassador persona non grata — ordered to leave by March 29; Lebanon recalls own ambassador from Tehran; Hezbollah calls it 'reckless and reprehensible'

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Lebanon declares Iranian ambassador persona non grata
Washington Post — Lebanon orders Iran's ambassador out

text: PHILIPPINES EMERGENCY: President Marcos declares national energy emergency — first country to do so over Iran war; fuel prices up ~200%, only 45 days supply remaining; 4-day work week for civil servants

sources.name: Rappler — Marcos declares national energy emergency
Fortune — Philippine president declares state of emergency over energy supply

text: KUWAIT AIRPORT HIT AGAIN: Iranian drones strike fuel depot at Kuwait International Airport — 4th attack since Feb 28; fire triggered, no casualties; Saudi Arabia intercepts 5 more drones over Eastern Province

sources.name: Gulf News — Iranian drone strikes hit fuel depot at Kuwait airport
PBS — Strikes hit Iran while Tehran targets Gulf states

text: TRUMP APPROVAL SINKS: Reuters/Ipsos poll — Trump approval hits record low 36%; only 35% support Iran strikes; only 29% approve economic handling; Hegseth: 'We negotiate with bombs'

sources.name: The Hill — Trump approval rating drops to record low
PBS — 'We negotiate with bombs,' Hegseth says

text: IDF DAMAGE ASSESSMENT: 3,000+ Iranian targets struck since Feb 28; 330 of 470 missile launchers destroyed; Iran's daily launch rate dropped 90% from ~90/day to ~10/day; IRGC main security HQ in Tehran confirmed destroyed

sources.name: Time — Iran strikes Israel as war rages
JNS — IDF launches large-scale strikes on Iranian targets

text: GERMANY CONDEMNS: President Steinmeier calls war 'breach of international law' and 'politically disastrous mistake' — says trust in US 'lost'; Rubio heads to G7 in France to 'sell' war to skeptical allies

sources.name: France 24 — German president says war is breach of international law
US News — Rubio plans travel to France to sell Iran war to G7 allies
